01PG4xgdR3.description: Navigation link to GeoGuessr notes page

JUiejykcm2.defaultMessage: <link>I'm currently Master I on GeoGuessr.</link> I try to write detailed region-guessing notes for each country. Hopefully you can learn something from them just as much as I try not to forget them.

JjssUYmJJZ.defaultMessage: I'm a casual road cyclist, and now I'm starting out running.

RzRcrOo2P2.defaultMessage: I made this website to put on my LinkedIn, so I'd have an excuse to send more connection requests. I want more people checking out my website. I try to work on my own projects outside of work as well - it complements my work, and vice versa.
RzRcrOo2P2.description: Second paragraph about the website purpose

TwXGJZuUNk.defaultMessage: Currently I'm working at Luxury Escapes as a Software Engineer. Prior to that, I got the opportunity to work as a Vacation Student at CSIRO under the supervision of Dr. Liz Cooper and Dr. Jason Dowling.

mqMqZN5PTv.defaultMessage: <link>Professor-style websites</link> look really cool, so I'm making mine similar.
